parsed.production_notes: The video combines human actors with an AI-generated 3D avatar. The human footage appears to be dubbed into Spanish, as the lip-syncing does not match the audio. The second scene uses a split-screen format typical of AI app advertisements.

characters.appearance: Young woman, early 20s, slim build, fair complexion. Long brown hair styled in a side braid over her left shoulder.
characters.wardrobe: In the first scene, she wears a rust-colored cardigan, a white ribbed top, a patterned scarf, and dark jeans. In the second scene, she wears a light grey crewneck sweatshirt.
characters.demeanor: Initially hesitant and nervous, transitioning to enthusiastic and smiling.

characters.appearance: Middle-aged man, average build, fair complexion. Short, styled grey hair.
characters.wardrobe: Navy blue quarter-zip sweater and olive green pants.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female character, fair complexion, large expressive eyes. Red hair pulled back neatly.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue police-style uniform shirt with a silver badge, a shoulder-mounted radio, and a black tie.

scenes.setting: Busy airport terminal, daytime, bright natural lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with a side braid stands in a busy airport terminal, holding a smartphone in one hand and the handle of a rolling suitcase in the other. She wears a rust-colored cardigan over a white top, with a patterned scarf. An older man with grey hair, wearing a navy blue quarter-zip sweater, approaches her from behind, also pulling a suitcase. They engage in a conversation. The background shows other travelers walking and standing in line, with large windows letting in daylight.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a young woman struggling to practice her English in an airport setting. An older man notices her difficulty and steps in to offer advice, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. The camera remains relatively static, capturing their interaction in a medium shot with the bustling airport environment visible behind them.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I am flying to Miami. One luggage. I am flying to... No, one suitcase...
Character B says: ¿Primera vez viajando sola y hablando inglés? [First time traveling alone and speaking English?]
Character A says: ¿Se nota tanto? Entiendo todo, pero cuando me toca hablar me bloqueo. [Is it that obvious? I understand everything, but when it's my turn to speak I freeze.]
Character B says: A mi hija le pasaba igual. Practica con Loora, es una IA con la que simplemente hablas. Como hacer todo el check-in antes de llegar al aeropuerto. [The same thing happened to my daughter. Practice with Loora, it's an AI you just talk to. Like doing all the check-in before arriving at the airport.]
Character A says: ¿Una IA? ¿En inglés? [An AI? In English?]
Character B says: Diez minutos al día. El mes pasado ella sola reservó nuestro hotel en Miami. [Ten minutes a day. Last month she booked our hotel in Miami all by herself.]
Character A says: Bueno, necesito eso. [Well, I need that.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
I am flying to Miami.
One luggage.
I am flying to...
No, one suitcase...
¿Primera vez viajando sola y hablando inglés? (First time traveling alone and speaking English?)
¿Se nota tanto? (Is it that obvious?)
Entiendo todo, pero cuando me toca hablar (I understand everything, but when it's my turn to speak)
me bloqueo. (I freeze.)
A mi hija le pasaba igual. (The same thing happened to my daughter.)
Practica con Loora, es una IA con la que simplemente hablas. (Practice with Loora, it's an AI you just talk to.)
Como hacer todo el check-in antes de llegar al aeropuerto. (Like doing all the check-in before arriving at the airport.)
¿Una IA? ¿En inglés? (An AI? In English?)
Diez minutos al día. (Ten minutes a day.)
El mes pasado ella sola reservó nuestro hotel en Miami. (Last month she booked our hotel in Miami all by herself.)
Bueno, necesito eso. (Well, I need that.)

scenes.setting: Split screen showing a virtual border control booth and an airport terminal.

panels.panel_visual_description: A 3D animated female border control officer with red hair pulled back rests her chin on her hand, leaning on a counter. She wears a dark blue police-style uniform shirt with a silver badge, a shoulder-mounted radio, and a black tie. A piece of paper with the words 'BORDER CONTROL' is visible on the counter. The background is a blurred, brightly lit airport terminal.

A young woman with a side braid, wearing a light grey crewneck sweatshirt, stands in an airport terminal. She is looking directly at the camera, smiling and speaking. She wears a black crossbody bag strap. The background is a blurred airport concourse with large windows, structural columns, and people walking in the distance.

scenes.visual_description: The screen is split vertically down the middle. On the left, an animated AI avatar acts as a border control officer, while on the right, the young woman interacts with the avatar. They are having a conversation, simulating a real-life travel scenario.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character C says: Hello, where are you flying? [Hello, where are you flying?]
Character A says: I fly a... London. [I fly a... London.]
Character C says: ¿Quieres decir: "I am flying to London"? [Do you mean: "I am flying to London"?]
Character A says: Yes, sorry. I am flying to London. [Yes, sorry. I am flying to London.]
Character C says: Any luggage to check in? [Any luggage to check in?]
Character A says: Mmm... luggage? [Mmm... luggage?]
Character C says: Sí, luggage. Pueden ser bolsas, maletas y otras cosas que la gente usa para llevar sus pertenencias cuando viaja. [Yes, luggage. They can be bags, suitcases and other things people use to carry their belongings when traveling.]
Character A says: Oh, I have one luggage. Ay, perdón, mi inglés no es muy bueno. [Oh, I have one luggage. Oh, sorry, my English is not very good.]
Character C says: ¡No te preocupes! ¿Cuántas veces hablaste en inglés el último mes? [Don't worry! How many times did you speak in English last month?]
Character A says: La verdad, no hablé nada. [To be honest, I didn't speak at all.]
Character C says: Entonces, ¿cómo esperas hablar con fluidez? [Then, how do you expect to speak fluently?]
Character A says: No tengo a nadie con quien practicar. [I don't have anyone to practice with.]
Character C says: Solo descarga Loora. Vamos a hablar juntas todos los días y vas a hablar inglés con fluidez mucho más rápido de lo que crees. [Just download Loora. We are going to talk together every day and you will speak English fluently much faster than you think.]
Character A says: Qué increíble. Voy a agregar esto a mi rutina diaria desde hoy. [How incredible. I am going to add this to my daily routine starting today.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Hello, where are you flying?
I fly London.
¿Quieres decir: "I am flying to London"? (Do you mean: "I am flying to London"?)
Yes, sorry.
I am flying to London.
Any luggage to check in?
Luggage?
Sí, luggage. (Yes, luggage.)
Pueden ser bolsas, maletas (They can be bags, suitcases)
y otras cosas que la gente usa (and other things people use)
para llevar sus pertenencias cuando viaja. (to carry their belongings when traveling.)
Oh, I have one luggage.
Ay, perdón (Oh, sorry)
mi inglés no es muy bueno. (my English is not very good.)
¡No te preocupes! (Don't worry!)
¿Cuántas veces hablaste en inglés el último mes? (How many times did you speak in English last month?)
La verdad, no hablé nada. (To be honest, I didn't speak at all.)
Entonces, ¿cómo esperas hablar con fluidez? (Then, how do you expect to speak fluently?)
No tengo a nadie con quien practicar. (I don't have anyone to practice with.)
Solo descarga Loora. (Just download Loora.)
Vamos a hablar juntas todos los días (We are going to talk together every day)
y vas a hablar inglés con fluidez mucho más rápido (and you will speak English fluently much faster)
de lo que crees. (than you think.)
Qué increíble. (How incredible.)
Voy a agregar esto a mi rutina diaria desde hoy. (I am going to add this to my daily routine starting today.)
Loora
